comment: VCSL Flemish Harpsichord — plucked, naturally decaying (decay-path
rather than loop-path: the pluck transient + few-second decay leaves no
0.3s+ steady region for the loop analyzer to seam, so we treat it like
piano/harp). The instrument is sampled in two registers (Low: A#0–G#4,
High: A#1–G#5) with a non-chromatic pitch grid; filePatterns try Low
first, then High. noteSemis covers the union of available pitch classes
— gaps will 404 cleanly. Generated by analyzer/generate-samples.js from
